content:
Now I have a good understanding of the template structure and placeholders. Let me create the replacement logic to handle both simple placeholders and conditional sections.

```json
{
  "analysis": "I have inspected the template and found all the placeholders. I also identified the conditional section markers ({{IF_RELOCATION}} and {{END_IF_RELOCATION}}). Now I need to create the replacement logic that handles both simple placeholders and conditional sections.",
  "plan": "I'll write a Python script to process the template. The script will: 1) Load the template using python-docx, 2) Read the employee data JSON, 3) Replace all placeholders with the corresponding values, 4) Handle the conditional RELOCATION section, 5) Save the result to /root/offer_letter_filled.docx.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 << 'EOF'
from docx import Document
import json
import re

# Load template
doc = Document('offer_letter_template.docx')

# Read employee data JSON
with open('employee_data.json') as f:
    employee_data = json.load(f)

# Define replacement function
def replace_placeholder(paragraph, placeholder, value):
    if placeholder in paragraph.text:
        paragraph.text = paragraph.text.replace(placeholder, str(value))

# Replace all placeholders
for para in doc.paragraphs:
    replace_placeholder(para, '{{CANDIDATE_FULL_NAME}}', employee_data['CANDIDATE_FULL_NAME'])
    replace_placeholder(para, '{{COMPANY_NAME}}', employee_data['COMPANY_NAME'])
    replace_placeholder(para, '{{DATE}}', employee_data['DATE'])
    replace_placeholder(para, '{{STREET_ADDRESS}}', employee_data['STREET_ADDRESS'])
    replace_placeholder(para, '{{CITY}}, {{STATE}} {{ZIP_CODE}}', employee_data['CITY'] + ', ' + employee_data['STATE'] + ' ' + employee_data['ZIP_CODE'])
    replace_placeholder(para, '{{POSITION}}', employee_data['POSITION'])
    replace_placeholder(para, '{{DEPARTMENT}}', employee_data['DEPARTMENT'])
    replace_placeholder(para, '{{START_DATE}}', employee_data['START_DATE'])
    replace_placeholder(para, '{{MANAGER_NAME}}', employee_data['MANAGER_NAME'])
    replace_placeholder(para, '{{BASE_SALARY}}', employee_data['BASE_SALARY'])
    replace_placeholder(para, '{{SIGNING_BONUS}}', employee_data['SIGNING_BONUS'])
    replace_placeholder(para, '{{EQUITY_SHARES}}', employee_data['EQUITY_SHARES'])
    replace_placeholder(para, '{{RELOCATION_PACKAGE}}', 'Yes' if employee_data['RELOCATION_PACKAGE'] == 'Yes' else 'No')
    replace_placeholder(para, '{{RELOCATION_AMOUNT}}', employee_data['RELOCATION_AMOUNT'])
    replace_placeholder(para, '{{RELOCATION_DAYS}}', employee_data['RELOCATION_DAYS'])
    replace_placeholder(para, '{{PTO_DAYS}}', employee_data['PTO_DAYS'])
    replace_placeholder(para, '{{RESPONSE_DEADLINE}}', employee_data['RESPONSE_DEADLINE'])
    replace_placeholder(para, '{{HR_NAME}}', employee_data['HR_NAME'])
    replace_placeholder(para, '{{HR_TITLE}}', employee_data['HR_TITLE'])

# Handle conditional RELOCATION section
for para in doc.paragraphs:
    if '{{IF_RELOCATION}}' in para.text:
        if employee_data['RELOCATION_PACKAGE'] == 'Yes':
            para.text = para.text.replace('{{IF_RELOCATION}}', '').replace('{{END_IF_RELOCATION}}', '').replace('{{RELOCATION_AMOUNT}}', employee_data['RELOCATION_AMOUNT']).replace('{{RELOCATION_DAYS}}', employee_data['RELOCATION_DAYS'])
        else:
            para.text = para.text.replace('{{IF_RELOCATION}}', '').replace('{{END_IF_RELOCATION}}', '')

# Save result to /root/offer_letter_filled.docx
doc.save('/root/offer_letter_filled.docx')
EOF
",
      "duration": 1.0
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
```
